_comment: IAM role that Redshift Serverless itself assumes to run the COPY statement in redshift/create_tables.sql / merge_fct_campaign_performance.sql (the ${RedshiftCopyRoleArn} placeholder in statemachine/redshift_load.asl.json). Trust policy: principal redshift.amazonaws.com. Read-only, silver/ only -- Redshift never needs bronze/ or rejected/, and never writes back to S3.
